nasb.text: See My hands and My feet, that it is I Myself; touch Me and see, for a spirit does not have flesh and bones as you see that I have.”

esv.text: See my hands and my feet, that it is I myself. Touch me, and see. For a spirit does not have flesh and bones as you see that I have.”

cnv.text: 你們看我的手、我的腳，就知道我是誰。摸我看看，靈沒有骨，沒有肉；你們看，我是有的。”

ccb.text: 你们看我的手和脚，就知道真的是我。来摸摸看，鬼魂没有骨和肉，你们看！我有。”

csbs.text: 你们看我的手、我的脚，确实是我。摸我看看！幽灵没有骨，也没有肉，你们看，我是有的。”
